languages.text: "Благословенный {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссия{/g}! Да не коснется твоих цепей вредоносный код!" {n}Альва-9 разворачивается к вам: правая рука, которой техножрица вырывала что-то из буровой установки, почернела и оплавилась. В скрюченных металлических пальцах зажато странное устройство, сделанное из гладкого черного материала. Из глубины устройства раздается тихий гул.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Благословенный {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссия{/g}! Да не коснется твоих цепей вредоносный код!" {n}Альва-9 разворачивается к вам: правая рука, которой техножрица вырывала что-то из буровой установки, почернела и оплавилась. В скрюченных металлических пальцах зажато странное устройство, сделанное из гладкого черного материала. Из глубины устройства раздается тихий гул.{/n}

languages.text: "Blessed {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}! May maleficent code never touch your circuitry!" {n}Alva-9 turns to you — the Tech-Priest's right hand, which she used to wrench something out of the machine, is blackened and melted. Clutched in her curled metal fingers is a strange device made of smooth black material. A low hum resonates from deep within it.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Благословенный {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссия{/g}! May maleficent code never touch your circuitry!" {n}Alva-9 turns to you — the Tech-Priest's right hand, which she used to wrench something out of the drill rig, is blackened and melted. "Blessed {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}! May maleficent code never touch your circuitry!" {n}Alva-9 turns to you — the Tech-Priest's right hand, which she used to wrench something out of the machine, is blackened and melted. Clutched in her curled metal fingers is a strange device made of smooth black material. A low hum resonates from deep within it.{/n}

languages.text: 「万能なる神聖なるオムニシア様！悪意のあるコードがあなたの回路に触れることのないよう！」{n}アルバ-9があなたに目を向ける。彼女がドリルから何かを掴み取った時の右手の金属は黒く溶けてしまっている。彼女の金属製の指で握られているのは、滑らかな黒色の素材でできた奇妙な装置だ。その内部から低い唸り音が響いている。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Blessed Omnissiah! May maleficent code never touch your circuitry!" {n}Alva-9 turns to you — the Tech-Priest's right hand, which she used to wrench something out of the drill rig, is blackened and melted. Clutched in her curled metal fingers is a strange device made of smooth black material. A low hum resonates from deep within it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「万能なる神聖なるオムニシア様！悪意のあるコードがあなたの回路に触れることのないよう！」{n}アルバ-9があなたに目を向ける。彼女がドリルから何かを掴み取った時の右手の金属は黒く溶けてしまっている。彼女の金属製の指で握られているのは、滑らかな黒色の素材でできた奇妙な装置だ。その内部から低い唸り音が響いている。{/n}

languages.text: «¡Loado sea el {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}! ¡Que el código maligno nunca toque sus circuitos!» {n}Alva-9 se gira hacia ti. La mano derecha de la tecnosacerdotisa, que había usado para arrancar algo de la máquina, está ennegrecida y derretida. En sus dedos de metal sujeta un extraño dispositivo hecho de material negro y liso que emite un zumbido grave.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Blessed {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}! May maleficent code never touch your circuitry!" {n}Alva-9 turns to you — the Tech-Priest's right hand, which she used to wrench something out of the machine, is blackened and melted. Clutched in her curled metal fingers is a strange device made of smooth black material. A low hum resonates from deep within it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡Loado sea el {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}! ¡Que el código maligno nunca toque sus circuitos!» {n}Alva-9 se gira hacia ti. La mano derecha de la tecnosacerdotisa, que había usado para arrancar algo de la máquina, está ennegrecida y derretida. En sus dedos de metal sujeta un extraño dispositivo hecho de material negro y liso que emite un zumbido grave.{/n}

languages.text: “赞美{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}！愿恶意代码永不触及您的回路！”{n}阿尔瓦-9转向你——她那只用来从机械里硬扯东西的右手已经焦黑熔毁。她蜷曲的金属手指间，紧攥着一个光滑黑色材质的奇特装置。该装置正发出低沉的嗡鸣。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Blessed {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}! May maleficent code never touch your circuitry!" {n}Alva-9 turns to you — the Tech-Priest's right hand, which she used to wrench something out of the machine, is blackened and melted. Clutched in her curled metal fingers is a strange device made of smooth black material. A low hum resonates from deep within it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “赞美{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}！愿恶意代码永不触及您的回路！”{n}阿尔瓦-9转向你——她那只用来从机械里硬扯东西的右手已经焦黑熔毁。她蜷曲的金属手指间，紧攥着一个光滑黑色材质的奇特装置。该装置正发出低沉的嗡鸣。{/n}

languages.text: "Gesegneter {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}! Möge kein Schadcode je Eure Schaltkreise berühren!" {n}Alva-9 wendet sich dir zu ... die rechte Hand der Techpriesterin, mit der sie etwas aus der Maschine geschraubt hat, ist geschwärzt und geschmolzen. In ihren Händen hält sie ein seltsames, aus glattem schwarzen Metall bestehendes Gerät. Aus seinem Inneren ertönt ein tiefes Summen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Blessed {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}! May maleficent code never touch your circuitry!" {n}Alva-9 turns to you — the Tech-Priest's right hand, which she used to wrench something out of the machine, is blackened and melted. Clutched in her curled metal fingers is a strange device made of smooth black material. A low hum resonates from deep within it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Gesegneter {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}! Möge kein Schadcode je Eure Schaltkreise berühren!" {n}Alva-9 wendet sich dir zu ... die rechte Hand der Techpriesterin, mit der sie etwas aus der Maschine geschraubt hat, ist geschwärzt und geschmolzen. In ihren Händen hält sie ein seltsames, aus glattem schwarzen Metall bestehendes Gerät. Aus seinem Inneren ertönt ein tiefes Summen.{/n}

languages.text: "Kutsal {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih{/g}! Kötücül kod, devrelerine asla dokunmasın!" {n}Alva-9 sana dönüyor. Tekno Rahip'in makineden bir şeyi söküp almak için kullandığı sağ eli kararmış ve erimiş. Kıvrılmış metal parmaklarının arasında pürüzsüz siyah malzemeden yapılmış tuhaf bir cihaz sıkıca duruyor. Cihazın derinliklerinden alçak bir uğultu yankılanıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Blessed {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}! May maleficent code never touch your circuitry!" {n}Alva-9 turns to you — the Tech-Priest's right hand, which she used to wrench something out of the machine, is blackened and melted. Clutched in her curled metal fingers is a strange device made of smooth black material. A low hum resonates from deep within it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Kutsal {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih{/g}! Kötücül kod, devrelerine asla dokunmasın!" {n}Alva-9 sana dönüyor. Tekno Rahip'in makineden bir şeyi söküp almak için kullandığı sağ eli kararmış ve erimiş. Kıvrılmış metal parmaklarının arasında pürüzsüz siyah malzemeden yapılmış tuhaf bir cihaz sıkıca duruyor. Cihazın derinliklerinden alçak bir uğultu yankılanıyor.{/n}

languages.text: « Béni soit l'{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnimessie{/g} ! Que vos circuits ne soient jamais gangrenés par du code malveillant ! » {n}Alva-9 se tourne vers vous. Sa main droite, celle-là même dont elle s'est servie pour arracher quelque chose des entrailles de la machine, est noircie et fondue. Elle serre dans ses doigts métalliques un étrange appareil fait d'un matériau noir et lisse et qui résonne d'un faible bourdonnement.{/n}
